title: Xi Jinping Holds Phone Call With Russia's Putin: State Media
description: Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke over the phone on Monday with his Russian counterpart Vladimir Putin, state media reported.
keywords: Vladimir Putin, Xi Jinping, russia china relations, russia china news
snippet:
Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke over the phone on Monday with his Russian counterpart Vladimir Putin, state media reported.
